creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Please postpone the deletion! An update of the port is underway. The developer is creating by the end of the week a new tarball of version 1.0.3 or higher with the patches for essentiell fixes for current FreeBSD versions and fixes of broken bib2ris data transformation, which now works!

I will send a DIFF for the port (also including the required stagin via ${STAGEDIR}) as soon as the developer has approved patches and created a news tarball on sourceforge. As far as it is in my power, I'd take the maintenance then. But I#d request the port to stay alive until then, please.

oh
